home.title: Configuration
home.subtitle: Set up the Telegram notification and CRM parameters, then proceed to the body assessment form.
home.form_desc: Configure Telegram bots, CRM IDs, and language before starting.
home.chat_ids_help: Enter one or more Telegram chat IDs separated by commas.
home.bot_index_help: Which Telegram bot to use (from the bots table).

footer.disclaimer: AI estimate — not medical advice. Body composition is shown as a range with confidence. Consult a clinician for diagnosis.

landing.hero_subtitle: An AI body and nutrition coach that reads twelve signals from a single scan — composition, posture, hydration, recovery — and turns them into a plan you can actually follow.
landing.stats_1_label: Of users complete their first scan in under 6 minutes.
landing.stats_2_label: Average increase in plan adherence vs. tracker apps.
landing.stats_3_label: Body, nutrition & lifestyle signals analysed per scan.
landing.stats_4_label: Languages — full localisation across English, ES, DE, FR, JP.
landing.services_subtitle: Every scan covers the same six domains. From body composition to recovery, we map what's working, what's drifting, and what needs your attention this week.
landing.service_1_body: Visible fat distribution, muscle balance, symmetry — read as ranges with confidence intervals.
landing.service_2_body: Forward-head angle, shoulder symmetry, hip alignment from front and side.
landing.service_3_body: Region-by-region tone, with targeted mobility and lift suggestions for the gaps.
landing.service_4_body: Skin tone, fascial tension, eye signals — turned into a daily water target.
landing.service_5_body: Pattern from logged sleep + cortisol cues, feeding into deload weeks and bedtimes.
landing.service_6_body: Energy, mood, digestion patterns logged across meals to refine your weekly plate.
landing.service_plan_body: Once your scan completes, we generate today's plate, this week's training, and your supplement stack. Re-scan in four weeks — we adjust against what actually moved.
landing.how_step1_text: Three photos — front, side, back. A live silhouette overlay tells you when you're framed.
landing.how_step2_text: Twelve metrics, six domains. Composition, posture, recovery, hydration, nutrition signals.
landing.how_step3_text: Today's plate, this week's training, your supplement stack — built from your actual scan.
landing.how_step4_text: Log meals, mark workouts done. Re-scan in 4 weeks. Watch the trend lines bend.
landing.testimonials_subtitle: We've run more than 95,000 scans in the last quarter. Here's what a handful of users told us — verbatim, in their own words.
landing.testimonial_1_text: The team didn't just build my plan — they helped me see why I'd been plateauing for a year. The hotspots on the body canvas were what finally made it click.
landing.testimonial_2_text: I've used four trackers. This is the first one that told me which lever to pull — and was right.
landing.testimonial_3_text: My re-scan after six weeks showed a posture +5 and waist −2 cm. Plan adherence was the difference.
landing.testimonial_4_text: The hydration insight alone paid for the year. I had no idea I was running dry on training days.
landing.testimonial_5_text: The supplement stack is opinionated — and accurate. Three items, all tied to something they read.
landing.cta_body: Three photos, a short questionnaire, and you'll have your composition read, today's plate, and this week's training before your coffee gets cold.
landing.footer_tagline: Building healthier bodies through science, design, and AI.

scan.rail_sub: Seven short steps. Takes about five minutes — your health assessment is built from this.
scan.access_message: To use the body assessment, you need a personalised access link from your coach. Please contact your coach to get started.

step1.display_sub: Tell us about yourself — we use this to tailor your report and reach you with results.
step1.name: Name
step1.phone_placeholder: Enter your phone number with country code
step1.disclaimer: We will send your report directly to your WhatsApp. Please verify that your phone number is correct. Thank you!

step2.display_sub: Your body measurements help us calculate your health metrics accurately.
step2.measurement_intro: Do you know your waist and hip measurements? Would you like me to measure them for you? It will only take a moment. (A measuring tape is recommended.)
step2.waist_help: Used to calculate your waist-to-hip ratio.
step2.hip_help: Used to calculate your waist-to-hip ratio.

step3.display_sub: What you eat shapes everything — we start here.
step3.diet_type: What kind of diet do you follow?
step3.meals_per_day: How many meals a day do you eat?
step3.breakfast_description: What kind of breakfast do you usually have?
step3.breakfast_description_placeholder: Briefly explain the combination of foods you usually eat.

step4.display_sub: How you move and how much you drink — two big levers.
step4.exercise_level: What is your level of physical exercise?

exercise_level_options.little: Little or no exercise / Office work

step4.exercise_duration: How long have you been exercising?
step4.water_intake: How many liters of water do you drink per day?

step5.display_sub: Select anything that applies — we use this to tailor product recommendations.
step5.health_conditions: Select one or more of the following conditions:

health_conditions_options.low_energy: Feels low on energy during the day
health_conditions_options.skin_cellulite: Wants to improve the appearance of skin and/or cellulite
health_conditions_options.demanding_job: Has a very demanding and physically exhausting job

step6.display_sub: What you're aiming for, and what you're already doing.
step6.goal: What goal would you like to achieve?

goal_options.weight_control: Control my weight and reduce body fat percentage
goal_options.maintain_care: Maintain my weight, but start taking better care of myself

step6.weight_at_ideal_age: Realistically, at what weight would you feel good?
step6.has_skincare_routine: Do you currently have a daily skincare, body, or hair care routine?
step6.skincare_products: What kind of products do you use?
step6.want_facial_evaluation: Would you like a free facial assessment?
step6.disclaimer: This self-assessment is not intended for diagnostic or therapeutic purposes. It is for informational purposes only and does not replace in any case the evaluation of a healthcare professional.

step7.display_sub: Review your information and make sure everything is correct.
step7.title: Ready to send?
step7.description: Review your information and make sure everything is correct.
step7.note: Before submitting, ensure that all the data you have provided is accurate.
step7.tip: Check your email ({{email}}) and phone number ({{phone}}) for possible errors.
step7.open_results:
Hello {{customerName}},

Thank you for completing the questionnaire and trusting us with your body assessment!

Very soon, the person who invited you to the study will contact you to share the report results.

Completing this information is the first step. We will be in touch with you soon!

Kind regards.

personal.birth_date_required: The date of birth is required.
personal.phone_invalid: The phone number must be valid.

habits.meals_per_day_required: Please select the number of meals.
habits.has_breakfast_required: Please indicate if you usually have breakfast.
habits.exercise_duration_required: Please select how long you have been exercising.
habits.water_intake_required: Please select your daily water intake.
habits.has_skincare_routine_required: Please indicate if you have a care routine.
habits.want_facial_evaluation_required: Please indicate if you would like a facial assessment.
habits.privacy_policy_required: You must accept the privacy policy to continue.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains what personal data we collect, how we process it, who we share it with, and what rights you have under applicable data protection laws including the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy.data_collected: We collect the following personal data when you use our body assessment service: your name, email address, phone number, date of birth, country, city, and questionnaire responses about your body, lifestyle and health habits.
privacy.how_we_process: Your questionnaire responses are stored securely in our database. Health metrics (BMI, body fat %, waist-to-hip ratio, caloric needs, etc.) are calculated from your measurements. All data is stored to provide your report and allow your coach to review results with you.
privacy.lawful_basis: We process your personal data based on your explicit consent, which you provide by accepting the privacy policy before submitting the body assessment form. You may withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us.
privacy.third_parties: We use the following third-party services to process your data: Vercel (application hosting) and Neon (database hosting). Each provider processes data in accordance with their own privacy policies and applicable data protection standards.
privacy.data_retention: Your personal data and analysis results are retained for as long as necessary to provide our services. You may request deletion of your data at any time. Upon receiving a valid deletion request, we will erase your data within 30 days.
privacy.your_rights: Under the GDPR and applicable data protection laws, you have the right to: access your personal data, rectify inaccurate data, erase your data (right to be forgotten), restrict processing, data portability, object to processing, and withdraw consent at any time. Exercising these rights will not affect the lawfulness of processing carried out before withdrawal.
privacy.how_to_contact: To exercise any of your rights, or if you have questions about this policy, please contact us at: privacy@nutritional.app. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
privacy.cookies: This application uses only essential cookies required for the service to function (e.g., language preference). We do not use tracking cookies, advertising cookies, or analytics cookies.
privacy.changes: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. When we make changes, we will update the 'Last updated' date at the top of this page.

common.timeout: Analysis took too long. Please try again.
